meaning: adj.(女子)卖弄风情的,妖艳的,迷人的
examples: She is a pretty and coquettish woman.
It is the prettiest, most coquettish little hand I ever saw.
On the heart, a coquettish. Look at the mark thin lover, troy.
Instead they will adjust their pose as required, shifting from full frontal to coquettish side-on 'you looking at me' stance.
Our house sat at the end of Gerard Avenue: coquettish and tattered, on tippy toes, it seemed, from the encroaching world.
